[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A split image shows a live video style portrait of a man on the left and an illustrated anime-style face with long black hair on the right.

Main Subject:
On the left, a man with a headset sits facing the camera with a slight smile; on the right, an illustrated character with long straight black hair looks forward with closed, red eyelashes and a small neutral smile.

Setting:
The left side appears to be indoors with a plain, dim background; the right side is a digital illustration on a solid, dark backdrop with no visible environment.

Visual Details:
The left panel shows the man wearing large black over-ear headphones with a microphone boom near his mouth and a dark top; lighting is soft and slightly dim. The right panel displays a close-up, front-facing anime-style head and shoulders, with pale skin, long black hair framing the face, red shading around the eyes and eyelashes, and a small choker-like dark band at the neck; the composition is centered and tightly cropped.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image combines a real person’s head-and-shoulders video view with a close-up illustration of an anime-style character with long black hair. The two halves are placed side by side, with the illustrated face dominating the right side.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
